## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Exchange adapter validation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI / deployment

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `python -m ruff check src tests scripts`
- [ ] Docker build tested
- [ ] Not applicable

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No API keys, secrets, passphrases, private keys, `.env` files, or SQLite runtime DB files are included.
- [ ] The change does not add profit guarantees or financial advice claims.
- [ ] Mainnet-related changes are behind explicit opt-in checks.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where relevant.

## Notes

Add screenshots, logs, or validation notes if helpful. Remove any sensitive information before posting.
